'''Brogar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Legacy 9" /> [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] who owned [[Brogar's Safe House and Cantina]] on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] that doubled as a safe house for those who needed a place to lay low. Brogar used armed [[Droid/Legends|droid]] bouncers to keep the peace within his establishment.<ref name="LECG" />

By the year [[137 ABY]], some of his patrons included a compulsive [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] named [[Naxy Screeger]] and a fugitive [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Hosk Trey'lis]], both of whom were captured in defiance of Brogar's offered sanctuary by [[Cade Skywalker]], [[Jariah Syn]], and [[Deliah Blue]].<ref name="Legacy 2" />

Brogar denied to the trio of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] any knowledge that Trey'lis was a Jedi and claimed he must have been affected by a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]]. Because of the high risks involved with harboring a Jedi, Brogar allowed the breach in protocol and told Cade that this with a gesture of good faith to Cade's employer, the dreaded [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rav]].<ref name="Legacy 2" />
